mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subject_grade_weights (subject_id, attendance_weight, midterm_weight, final_weight, assignment_weight) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{attendanceWeight}, #{midtermWeight}, #{finalWeight}, #{assignmentWeight}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE attendance_weight = #{attendanceWeight}, midterm_weight = #{midtermWeight}, final_weight = #{finalWeight}, assignment_weight = #{assignmentWeight}

INSERT INTO subject_grade_ratios (subject_id, a_ratio, b_ratio, c_ratio, d_ratio, f_ratio) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{aRatio}, #{bRatio}, #{cRatio}, #{dRatio}, #{fRatio}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE a_ratio = #{aRatio}, b_ratio = #{bRatio}, c_ratio = #{cRatio}, d_ratio = #{dRatio}, f_ratio = #{fRatio}
mapper.select: SELECT st.id AS student_id, st.student_number, st.name, st.status, sg.attendance_score, sg.midterm_score, sg.final_score, sg.assignment_score FROM students st INNER JOIN subjects sub ON sub.id = #{subjectId} LEFT JOIN subject_grades sg ON sg.student_id = st.id AND sg.subject_id = #{subjectId} WHERE st.department = sub.department ORDER BY st.student_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subject_grades (subject_id, student_id, attendance_score, midterm_score, final_score, assignment_score) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{entry.studentId}, #{entry.attendanceScore}, #{entry.midtermScore}, #{entry.finalScore}, #{entry.assignmentScore}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE attendance_score = #{entry.attendanceScore}, midterm_score = #{entry.midtermScore}, final_score = #{entry.finalScore}, assignment_score = #{entry.assignmentScore}
